revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-335

Sun relay Daylight control

A device operated by daylight that automatically controls a light, often electric, lighting it at or about sunset and extinguishing it at or about sunrise.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Sun switch}}
